text:
Once upon a time in the little town of Willow Creek lived a curious fox named Felix.

Every evening Felix would sneak down onto Mrs Olson's attic attic party. Mrs Olson had plenty of attic space because she owned an antique shop selling feathers. Felix loved exploring these shops filled with feather pens nobody could find anything good about!

Sometimes Felix would find a feather pen like this fluffy pink one that just glittered.

Felix decided this feather would make a pretty ribbon.

He snuggled down through Mrs Olson's attic books until he found yarn!

There must've been some kind of party moth because moths lovedmothberries?!

He took his fancy feather boa home.

Mom wouldn't mind?!

He hid berry moths until one night he saw Mom sleeping. Felix draped his boa around Mom.

Mom woke up!

"What'd YOU do?"

Just playfully flutterbate"?

"Just bird."

She laughed.

Now we make our owl owl feather boa.

They hatched owl owlets.

Mom laughed so hard tears trick
